dependencies.name: linux-uapi-headers
dependencies.reason: Pinned sanitized Linux UAPI headers for the musl target sysroot

dependencies.name: musl
dependencies.revision: v1.2.6 plus the listed upstream security patch
securityNotes: CVE-2026-40200 affects 32-bit targets; this project builds only x86_64 and arm64
dependencies.reason: Sole target C library and static-PIE startup objects

dependencies.name: fortify-headers
dependencies.reason: Provide effective inline fortify checks missing from the pinned musl headers

dependencies.name: llvm-runtimes
buildOptions: compiler-rt builtins and static-PIE CRT objects only
tests and benchmarks disabled for runtime libraries
dependencies.reason: Pinned C++ runtime, ABI, unwinder, and compiler builtins

dependencies.name: boringssl
buildOptions: OPENSSL_NO_ASM=ON to keep every crypto object under ThinLTO and CFI
crypto and ssl static archives only
production hardening flags including fortify, ThinLTO, and trapping CFI
generated release sources only; Go and Perl are not invoked
dependencies.reason: Sole TLS and cryptography provider for origin and Runtime API HTTPS

dependencies.name: nghttp2
buildOptions: SIZEOF_SSIZE_T=8 for the two supported 64-bit targets
OpenSSL discovery disabled; libnghttp2 contains no TLS implementation
production hardening flags including fortify, ThinLTO, and trapping CFI
dependencies.reason: HTTP/2 framing and HPACK support for curl origin requests

dependencies.name: curl
buildOptions: CURL_USE_OPENSSL=ON with the pinned BoringSSL archives
USE_NGHTTP2=ON with the pinned static nghttp2 archive
CURL_ZLIB=ON with the pinned static zlib archive
brotli, zstd, libpsl, IDN, SSH, GSSAPI, and HTTP/3 disabled
cookies, authentication, proxy, netrc, alt-svc, HSTS, DoH, MIME, and WebSocket support disabled
no default CA bundle or CA directory; callers supply embedded trust data
production hardening flags including fortify, ThinLTO, and trapping CFI
dependencies.reason: Bounded HTTP/HTTPS transport for the Lambda Runtime API and validated origins

dependencies.name: libexpat
buildOptions: EXPAT_BUILD_TESTS=OFF with a first-party bounded in-memory parser test
EXPAT_DTD=ON, EXPAT_GE=ON, and EXPAT_NS=ON with amplification protections retained
EXPAT_WITH_GETRANDOM=ON using the musl getrandom wrapper as the sole entropy source
arc4random, getentropy, direct SYS_getrandom, and /dev/urandom sources disabled
static libexpat archive, public headers, generated configuration, and expat.pc only
production hardening flags including fortify, ThinLTO, and trapping CFI
securityNotes: xmlwf-only fixes CVE-2026-56409 through CVE-2026-56411 are present upstream while xmlwf is excluded from this build
dependencies.reason: Pinned XML parser required by libvips metadata and serialization support

dependencies.name: pcre2
buildOptions: PCRE2_SUPPORT_JIT=OFF to forbid runtime executable-memory generation
PCRE2_BUILD_PCRE2GREP=OFF and PCRE2_BUILD_TESTS=OFF with a first-party bounded Unicode match test
POSIX wrapper, pcre2test, pcre2grep, documentation, and shared libraries excluded
default upstream match, depth, heap, lookbehind, and nesting limits retained
static libpcre2-8 archive, public header, and libpcre2-8.pc only
production hardening flags including fortify, ThinLTO, and trapping CFI
warnings as errors except -Wno-overlength-strings for the upstream 5686-byte error-message table
securityNotes: 10.47 fixes an easily reachable pcre2_callout_enumerate crash for patterns containing a Unicode character class
JIT is excluded so the production process does not allocate executable memory for regular expressions
dependencies.reason: Pinned Unicode regular-expression engine required by GLib GRegex

dependencies.name: zlib
buildOptions: ZLIB_INSTALL=OFF with curated archive and header installation
production hardening flags including fortify, ThinLTO, and trapping CFI
dependencies.reason: Bounded HTTP content decoding and PNG/codec compression support

dependencies.name: libpng
buildOptions: shared libraries, tests, tools, and generated symbol scripts excluded
production hardening flags including fortify, ThinLTO, and trapping CFI
securityNotes: 1.6.58 includes the 1.6.57 fixes for CVE-2026-34757 and the 1.6.56 fixes for CVE-2026-33416 and CVE-2026-33636
1.6.58 fixes the png_get_PLTE stale-palette regression introduced in 1.6.56
dependencies.reason: Pinned PNG decode/encode primitives for static images and the first-party APNG pipeline

dependencies.name: libjpeg-turbo
buildOptions: WITH_SIMD=OFF so every codec object remains under ThinLTO and trapping CFI and output stays architecture-independent
WITH_JPEG7=OFF and WITH_JPEG8=OFF for the libjpeg v6b-compatible API/ABI
WITH_TESTS=OFF with a first-party in-memory encode/decode smoke test
CMAKE_SIZEOF_VOID_P=8 for the two supported 64-bit targets
SIZE_T=8 and UNSIGNED_LONG=8 for the two supported LP64 targets
-Wno-unused-parameter for upstream precision-wrapper callbacks whose parameters are conditionally unused
production hardening flags including fortify, ThinLTO, and trapping CFI
securityNotes: 3.1.4.1 includes the 3.1.4 fix for TurboJPEG destination-buffer reallocation paths that could leak memory or lead to a caller double free; the TurboJPEG API is nevertheless excluded from this build
dependencies.reason: Pinned JPEG decode/encode primitives for libvips and first-entry ICO fallback

dependencies.name: libwebp
buildOptions: all command-line tools, examples, extras, JavaScript, and fuzztest targets disabled
near-lossless encoding, 16-bit colorspace swapping, and bit tracing disabled
libsharpyuv, libwebp, libwebpdemux, and libwebpmux static archives only
production hardening flags including fortify, ThinLTO, and trapping CFI
dependencies.reason: Pinned WebP encode/decode and animation mux/demux primitives for static output and the first-party APNG pipeline

dependencies.name: libnsgif
buildOptions: first-party CMake adapter compiles only src/gif.c and src/lzw.c
upstream examples, tests, fuzz corpora, documentation, and NetSurf buildsystem excluded
production hardening flags including fortify, ThinLTO, and trapping CFI
strict upstream warning set with warnings as errors
dependencies.reason: Pinned GIF frame scanning, animation metadata, and decode primitives used by the libvips GIF loader

dependencies.name: libexif
buildOptions: first-party CMake adapter compiles exactly the 25 upstream library C sources
static libexif archive, public API headers, and libexif.pc only
Canon, Fuji, Olympus, and Pentax MakerNote parsers enabled
NLS, gettext, documentation, tests, examples, and tools excluded
-Wno-switch for upstream GPS tag macros intentionally outside the historical ExifTag enum
production hardening flags including fortify, ThinLTO, and trapping CFI
LGPL corresponding-source and relink artifacts required in the release compliance bundle
securityNotes: 0.6.26 fixes CVE-2026-32775, CVE-2026-40385, and CVE-2026-40386 in MakerNote parsing
dependencies.reason: Pinned EXIF metadata and orientation parsing for the libvips JPEG loader

dependencies.name: lcms2
buildOptions: LCMS2_BUILD_TESTS=OFF with a first-party bounded in-memory ICC round-trip test
CMAKE_C_BYTE_ORDER=LITTLE_ENDIAN for the two supported Lambda targets
CMAKE_SIZEOF_VOID_P=8 for the two supported 64-bit targets
lcms2 static archive and public API header only
production hardening flags including fortify, ThinLTO, and trapping CFI
securityNotes: 2.19 includes the fix for CVE-2026-41254 and additional integer-overflow guards; 2.19.1 is the upstream hot-fix release
dependencies.reason: Pinned ICC profile parsing, generation, and color transforms for the libvips media pipeline

dependencies.name: yyjson
buildOptions: production hardening flags including fortify, ThinLTO, and CFI
dependencies.reason: Bounded Function URL event parsing and response metadata serialization

dependencies.name: googletest
dependencies.reason: GoogleTest unit-test framework; excluded from bootstrap
